definition:
1. to make equal  or even bring to a level with , Lat. exaequare, τινά or τί τινι (Sophocles Tragicus):—; Mid. to make oneself equal , (Babrius Fabularum Scriptor):—;Pass. to be  or become equal , τινι (Plato Philosophus), etc.; to be a match for, to rival , τινι (Thucydides) 
2. to put on a level , τοὺς πολίτας (Aristophanes Comicus) 
3. intransitive to be equal  or like , μητρὶ δ᾽ οὐδὲν ἐξισοῖ acts  in no way like  a mother, (Sophocles Tragicus); ἐξ. τοῖς ἄλλοις (Thucydides): so in Pass., (Sophocles Tragicus) (ML)
